race.comment: The final race has taken a hit from scratchings but the resuming KAGEMUSHA (2) looks well placed. He's a lightly raced type who has won 2/6, both on rain-affected tracks. He took on some strong races last time in and this suits, albeit 1000m is on the sharp side. NASRAAWY (5) struggled last time but had been good fresh at Werribee. Back to 1000m suits him much better, he'll be up near the speed and can prove hard to run down. CORE CONCEPT (17) has been going okay without winning this time in, trying hard on heavy ground at Pakenham latest when a narrow fourth. Drawn wide but he'll roll forward and be in the finish. TORVEGA (11) ran well fresh here in a BM56 and can improve off that with each way claims.
